sizing_rule.note: Position size must be scaled inversely to 20-day volatility (calculated as rolling standard deviation). Volatility input derived from either implied volatility or 20-day historical sample variance/standard deviation. No specific scaling multiplier provided by author.

source_rule_text: Traders must calculate and input volatility as a critical parameter for position sizing models, using either implied volatility from the marketplace or estimated volatility through 20-day sample variance and standard deviation conversion.
